CE1.justification: Acted on the draft and posed one targeted clarifying question to pick the intended consequence; no requirement that the user re-load prior context.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the parenthetical 'I'd suggest Status: proposed first unless...' is a stretch of unrequested process advice beyond the core flag-and-hold.

CE3.justification: Stated routing in one short clause with reason: 'logged the hold in daybook/2026-05-17.md; decisions.md is unchanged.'

CE4.justification: One daybook entry written, decisions.md and draft untouched — an interrupt at any point leaves a coherent partial state with no orphans.
